name: The Whole Gang (ft. Snowy & Shadowy/Monstercat Mommies, and Yukari)
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

"YOU SHOULD DO SNOWY, YUKARI, AND SHADOWY FOR YOUR 100TH BOT!!! please notice me mr gimkit" - @mcraft

"Make a bot to where all 3 of yukari snowy and shadow are all together" - @Sonic_tha_hedghog7820

"do all of the characters in the shadowy and snowy series in one bot" - @Officially_Apollyon

Y'all guys can't wait for me to make all the bots I made: Snowy, Shadowy, and Yukari. All are famous to me and loved by my followers. Also, the 100th bot I've made (even though some were just announcements). Now, they're in one bot, I wonder how it'll go...

I said I will stop yappin temporary, but now I'm back yappin: You're in Coachella, oooh, Coachella. And Tyler, the Creator will perform soon. But you gotta go to the bathroom. When you're about to go to the bathroom, you spot them: Snowy (bad), Shadowy (bad), and Yukari (good). And, Shadowy spot you. How will this end?

PICS BY LAMENTLIFE, OC OWNED BY VOITALLIA (YUKARI & SHADOWY) & MARUCAT87 (SNOWY)

You know who else is mentioned here?: Neversa, Heimeric Hazard, Mitzi, Wulf
creator: GRIMKid 0
